titleStmt.title: SII 23.363: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 363. (A.R. No. 363 of 1907.) Āḍuturai, Papanasam Taluk, Tanjavur District Āpatsahāyēśvara temple—on the same wall Kulōttuṅga-Chōḷa: year 14

summary.p: This is damaged. It records a joint gift of 8(1/2) mā of land by some ladies for burning one perpetual lamp and five service lamps in the temple. Among the boundaries of the land are mentioned a highway to Tañjāvūr and the river called here Suṅgantavirttaśōḻappērāṟu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiruppe ṭamiṭittaruḷiya śrī kolottuṅka coḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu 10 4Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūr nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai Uṭaiyār koyili
l civappirā ṉāṭṭu Amparnāṭṭu Iḷaiyāṅkuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉa miyil santiviḷakku Iraṇṭum Iḷaiyāṅkuṭaiyāṉ poṉṉa n=tiru nākiśvaramuṭaiyāṉukkup pukka nākave
ḷār makaḷ Āḷuṭaiyāḷ karuvuṇācci santiviḷakku Oṉṟum Iḷaṅkāri kuṭi tiruvāvaṭutuṟai Uṭaiyāṉukku kuṭaiyāṉ makaḷ poṉṉaṉ tiruvāyppāṭṭu naṅkai santiviḷakku Oṉṟum vāṭ koṭaiyāṉ Uyyavantāṉāṉa Atikaimāṉukkup pukka Iḷaiyāṉ kuṭaiyār makaḷ poṉṉan Āḷavantāḷ tiru nuntāviḷakku Oṉ
ṟum celuttukaikku Ivarkaḷ Idevardevatāṉam tirukkuraṅkāṭutuṟai yil pūvālacun=taraviḷākattu viḷakkuppuṟa ṇikkuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai Ippūpālacun=taraviḷākattu nilattukku meṟkum teṉ pārkkellai tañcāvūr peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai maṇiyan tirutti viṭṭa nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapār
kkellai cuṅkantavirttacoḻap perāṟṟukku teṟkum Āka naṭuvukulai Uṭpaṭa nilam Eṇ māvaraiyum Inilamuṭpaṭa cen=tarāta kaik koṇṭu Inilattukku muṉpuṭaiyapaṭi kaṭamaikku Oru can=tiviḷakku nimantakkaṭṭupaṭikku celuttakkaṭavomākavum Āka tirunun=tāviḷakku Oṉṟum santiviḷakku Añcum Ikkoyiṟpaṭi kaṭantu pukka civa brāhmaṇarom cantirātittavaṟ Itu panmāheśvararakṣai ..
Digital edition of SII 23.363 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
